allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\dev\\puzzleAI" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName, @{Name="Type"; Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"DIR"}else{"FILE"}}} | Sort-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)
